document.title: 1320 S0 Void Gate Content Asset Database v2 EN
document.module: S0 Void Gate / 空性之门
document.purpose: Standalone S0 Void Gate content asset database for NOVA lookup and Awareness Layer report rendering.
document.bilingual_note: Full en + *_zh fields merged from steward v2 EN source and approved v1 bilingual masters (S0–S3, S6).

positioning.module_function: S0 Void Gate reflects the core illusion, void threshold, or inner misidentification the user is invited to observe and integrate.
positioning.important_boundary: S0 is not a fate gate, karmic sentence, fixed flaw, prediction, diagnosis, or spiritual status. It is a symbolic mirror for awareness.

calculation_dependency.zero_rule: Keep 0 as S0-00. Do not convert to S0-20.

nova_rendering_rule.lookup_behavior: NOVA calculates S0, looks up the matching S0-XX entry, and renders the approved fields.
allowed_generation: Short bridge sentence from Positioning Disclaimer to S0 section.
Brief integration summary using retrieved content only.
must_not_generate: Do not create a new S0 meaning from scratch.
Do not call S0 a destiny, curse, karmic punishment, diagnosis, or fixed identity.
Do not tell the user what major life decision to make based on S0.

content.name: Void Gate
content.reflection_question: What core illusion am I invited to see through?
content.reflective_summary: This Void Gate reflects the illusion of: Everything must be obtained from the outside world.. It invites the user to observe where this belief may shape perception, reactions, and self-protection without treating it as fate or fixed identity.
content.integration_key: The integration begins through: Stabilize presence and practice “doing nothing.”
content.one_week_practice: For one week, pause once a day and ask: “Where did this illusion appear today, and what would feel more true, grounded, and kind?”
content.safe_language_note: This interpretation is symbolic and reflective. It is not predictive, diagnostic, deterministic, medical, legal, financial, or religious advice, and it does not define a fixed identity.
content.core_illusion: Everything must be obtained from the outside world.
content.void_challenge: Unable to stop, continuously seeking confirmation.
content.void_power: The ability to return completely to the inner center.
content.path_of_return: Stabilize presence and practice “doing nothing.”
content.wisewave_guidance: The more you let go, the closer you come to truth.
content.reflective_summary_zh: 此空性之门映照的幻象是：一切都必须从外界获得。。邀请用户觉察此信念如何影响感知、反应与自我保护，而不将其视为命运或固定身份。
content.integration_key_zh: 整合从此开始：稳定存在，练习“什么也不做”。
content.core_illusion_zh: 一切都必须从外界获得。
content.void_challenge_zh: 无法停下来，持续寻求确认。
content.void_power_zh: 完全回到内在中心的能力。
content.path_of_return_zh: 稳定存在，练习“什么也不做”。
content.wisewave_guidance_zh: 你越是放下，越靠近真相。

content.name: Void Gate
content.reflection_question: What core illusion am I invited to see through?
content.reflective_summary: This Void Gate reflects the illusion of: Feeling that you are not good enough or not valuable enough.. It invites the user to observe where this belief may shape perception, reactions, and self-protection without treating it as fate or fixed identity.
content.integration_key: The integration begins through: Practice not proving yourself.
content.one_week_practice: For one week, pause once a day and ask: “Where did this illusion appear today, and what would feel more true, grounded, and kind?”
content.safe_language_note: This interpretation is symbolic and reflective. It is not predictive, diagnostic, deterministic, medical, legal, financial, or religious advice, and it does not define a fixed identity.
content.core_illusion: Feeling that you are not good enough or not valuable enough.
content.void_power: Deep self-affirmation.
content.path_of_return: Practice not proving yourself.
content.wisewave_guidance: You are already enough; you do not need to be proven.
content.reflective_summary_zh: 此空性之门映照的幻象是：觉得自己不够好，不够有价值。。邀请用户觉察此信念如何影响感知、反应与自我保护，而不将其视为命运或固定身份。
content.integration_key_zh: 整合从此开始：练习不证明自己。
content.core_illusion_zh: 觉得自己不够好，不够有价值。
content.void_challenge_zh: 自我价值依赖外部评价。
content.wisewave_guidance_zh: 你本来就足够，不需被证明。

content.name: Void Gate
content.reflection_question: What core illusion am I invited to see through?
content.reflective_summary: This Void Gate reflects the illusion of: Believing everything must be controlled in order to feel safe.. It invites the user to observe where this belief may shape perception, reactions, and self-protection without treating it as fate or fixed identity.
content.integration_key: The integration begins through: Practice allowing things to unfold naturally.
content.one_week_practice: For one week, pause once a day and ask: “Where did this illusion appear today, and what would feel more true, grounded, and kind?”
content.safe_language_note: This interpretation is symbolic and reflective. It is not predictive, diagnostic, deterministic, medical, legal, financial, or religious advice, and it does not define a fixed identity.
content.core_illusion: Believing everything must be controlled in order to feel safe.
content.void_power: The power of letting go and flowing with life.
content.path_of_return: Practice allowing things to unfold naturally.
content.wisewave_guidance: Control is a reaction of fear; trust is true strength.
content.reflective_summary_zh: 此空性之门映照的幻象是：认为必须掌控一切才会安全。。邀请用户觉察此信念如何影响感知、反应与自我保护，而不将其视为命运或固定身份。
content.integration_key_zh: 整合从此开始：练习允许事情自然发生。
content.core_illusion_zh: 认为必须掌控一切才会安全。
content.path_of_return_zh: 练习允许事情自然发生。
content.wisewave_guidance_zh: 控制是恐惧的反应，信任是真正的力量。

content.name: Void Gate
content.reflection_question: What core illusion am I invited to see through?
content.reflective_summary: This Void Gate reflects the illusion of: Believing that you are separate from the world.. It invites the user to observe where this belief may shape perception, reactions, and self-protection without treating it as fate or fixed identity.
content.integration_key: The integration begins through: Replace defense with openness.
content.one_week_practice: For one week, pause once a day and ask: “Where did this illusion appear today, and what would feel more true, grounded, and kind?”
content.safe_language_note: This interpretation is symbolic and reflective. It is not predictive, diagnostic, deterministic, medical, legal, financial, or religious advice, and it does not define a fixed identity.
content.core_illusion: Believing that you are separate from the world.
content.void_power: The ability to build connection and a sense of unity.
content.path_of_return: Replace defense with openness.
content.wisewave_guidance: You have never truly been separate from the world.
content.reflective_summary_zh: 此空性之门映照的幻象是：认为自己与世界分离。。邀请用户觉察此信念如何影响感知、反应与自我保护，而不将其视为命运或固定身份。
content.integration_key_zh: 整合从此开始：用开放取代防御。
content.core_illusion_zh: 认为自己与世界分离。
content.wisewave_guidance_zh: 你从未与世界分离过。

content.name: Void Gate
content.reflection_question: What core illusion am I invited to see through?
content.reflective_summary: This Void Gate reflects the illusion of: Believing you must be perfect in order to be loved.. It invites the user to observe where this belief may shape perception, reactions, and self-protection without treating it as fate or fixed identity.
content.integration_key: The integration begins through: See the beauty of imperfection.
content.one_week_practice: For one week, pause once a day and ask: “Where did this illusion appear today, and what would feel more true, grounded, and kind?”
content.safe_language_note: This interpretation is symbolic and reflective. It is not predictive, diagnostic, deterministic, medical, legal, financial, or religious advice, and it does not define a fixed identity.
content.core_illusion: Believing you must be perfect in order to be loved.
content.void_power: The ability to accept your real self.
content.path_of_return: See the beauty of imperfection.
content.wisewave_guidance: Perfection is not the goal; truth is.
content.reflective_summary_zh: 此空性之门映照的幻象是：认为必须做到完美才值得被爱。。邀请用户觉察此信念如何影响感知、反应与自我保护，而不将其视为命运或固定身份。
content.integration_key_zh: 整合从此开始：看见不完美的美。
content.core_illusion_zh: 认为必须做到完美才值得被爱。
content.wisewave_guidance_zh: 完美不是目标，真实才是。

content.name: Void Gate
content.reflection_question: What core illusion am I invited to see through?

content.one_week_practice: For one week, pause once a day and ask: “Where did this illusion appear today, and what would feel more true, grounded, and kind?”

content.void_power: The ability to become the observer of emotions.
content.path_of_return: Practice conscious breathing and separation from emotional identification.
content.wisewave_guidance: Emotion is speaking, but you are not the emotion.
content.reflective_summary_zh: 此空性之门映照的幻象是：情绪等于真相。。邀请用户觉察此信念如何影响感知、反应与自我保护，而不将其视为命运或固定身份。

content.path_of_return_zh: 练习觉知呼吸与情绪分离。
content.wisewave_guidance_zh: 情绪在说话，但你不是情绪。

content.name: Void Gate
content.reflection_question: What core illusion am I invited to see through?
content.reflective_summary: This Void Gate reflects the illusion of: Believing happiness must come from relationships.. It invites the user to observe where this belief may shape perception, reactions, and self-protection without treating it as fate or fixed identity.

content.one_week_practice: For one week, pause once a day and ask: “Where did this illusion appear today, and what would feel more true, grounded, and kind?”

content.core_illusion_zh: 认为幸福必须来自关系。
content.path_of_return_zh: 回到自身的内在安全感。
content.wisewave_guidance_zh: 关系不是来源，你自己才是。

content.name: Void Gate
content.reflection_question: What core illusion am I invited to see through?
content.reflective_summary: This Void Gate reflects the illusion of: Believing others’ opinions matter more than your own truth.. It invites the user to observe where this belief may shape perception, reactions, and self-protection without treating it as fate or fixed identity.
content.integration_key: The integration begins through: Stop asking the outside world, “Am I okay?”
content.one_week_practice: For one week, pause once a day and ask: “Where did this illusion appear today, and what would feel more true, grounded, and kind?”
content.safe_language_note: This interpretation is symbolic and reflective. It is not predictive, diagnostic, deterministic, medical, legal, financial, or religious advice, and it does not define a fixed identity.
content.core_illusion: Believing others’ opinions matter more than your own truth.
content.void_power: The ability to define your own value.
content.path_of_return: Stop asking the outside world, “Am I okay?”
content.wisewave_guidance: Other people’s voices are not your truth.
content.reflective_summary_zh: 此空性之门映照的幻象是：你相信他人的眼光比自己的真实更重要。。邀请用户觉察此信念如何影响感知、反应与自我保护，而不将其视为命运或固定身份。
content.integration_key_zh: 整合从此开始：停止向外询问“我好吗”。
content.core_illusion_zh: 你相信他人的眼光比自己的真实更重要。
content.wisewave_guidance_zh: 别人的声音不是你的真相。

content.name: Void Gate
content.reflection_question: What core illusion am I invited to see through?
content.reflective_summary: This Void Gate reflects the illusion of: Fear of being too late or missing out.. It invites the user to observe where this belief may shape perception, reactions, and self-protection without treating it as fate or fixed identity.
content.integration_key: The integration begins through: Return to this moment.
content.one_week_practice: For one week, pause once a day and ask: “Where did this illusion appear today, and what would feel more true, grounded, and kind?”
content.safe_language_note: This interpretation is symbolic and reflective. It is not predictive, diagnostic, deterministic, medical, legal, financial, or religious advice, and it does not define a fixed identity.
content.core_illusion: Fear of being too late or missing out.
content.void_challenge: Anxiety about the future and difficulty being present.
content.void_power: The power of presence.
content.path_of_return: Return to this moment.
content.wisewave_guidance: The present moment is everything.
content.reflective_summary_zh: 此空性之门映照的幻象是：害怕来不及、害怕错过。。邀请用户觉察此信念如何影响感知、反应与自我保护，而不将其视为命运或固定身份。
content.integration_key_zh: 整合从此开始：回到此刻。
content.core_illusion_zh: 害怕来不及、害怕错过。
content.wisewave_guidance_zh: 当下就是全部。

content.name: Void Gate
content.reflection_question: What core illusion am I invited to see through?
content.reflective_summary: This Void Gate reflects the illusion of: Believing you must carry everything.. It invites the user to observe where this belief may shape perception, reactions, and self-protection without treating it as fate or fixed identity.

content.wisewave_guidance: Responsibility is not a burden; it is a choice.
content.reflective_summary_zh: 此空性之门映照的幻象是：认为必须承担一切。。邀请用户觉察此信念如何影响感知、反应与自我保护，而不将其视为命运或固定身份。
content.integration_key_zh: 整合从此开始：只承担属于你的部分。
content.core_illusion_zh: 认为必须承担一切。
content.wisewave_guidance_zh: 责任不是负担，而是选择。

content.name: Void Gate

content.reflective_summary: This Void Gate reflects the illusion of: Defining yourself through comparison.. It invites the user to observe where this belief may shape perception, reactions, and self-protection without treating it as fate or fixed identity.
content.integration_key: The integration begins through: Return from image to soul essence.

content.core_illusion_zh: 通过比较定义自己。
content.void_power_zh: 自我稳定与独立价值感。
content.wisewave_guidance_zh: 你是独一无二的表达。

content.void_power: The ability to see truth in the ordinary.

content.reflective_summary_zh: 此空性之门映照的幻象是：认为生命必须有“伟大目的”。。邀请用户觉察此信念如何影响感知、反应与自我保护，而不将其视为命运或固定身份。
content.integration_key_zh: 整合从此开始：从目标感回到存在。

content.void_challenge_zh: 对成就与意义过度执着。
content.wisewave_guidance_zh: 意义不是寻找，是存在。

content.name: Void Gate
content.reflection_question: What core illusion am I invited to see through?
content.reflective_summary: This Void Gate reflects the illusion of: Feeling that you must compensate or atone.. It invites the user to observe where this belief may shape perception, reactions, and self-protection without treating it as fate or fixed identity.

content.wisewave_guidance: You have already been forgiven; you simply have not yet released yourself.
content.reflective_summary_zh: 此空性之门映照的幻象是：觉得自己需要补偿、赎罪。。邀请用户觉察此信念如何影响感知、反应与自我保护，而不将其视为命运或固定身份。
content.integration_key_zh: 整合从此开始：放下过往记忆的重量。
content.core_illusion_zh: 觉得自己需要补偿、赎罪。
content.wisewave_guidance_zh: 你已经被原谅，只是你还没放过自己。

content.name: Void Gate
content.reflection_question: What core illusion am I invited to see through?
content.reflective_summary: This Void Gate reflects the illusion of: Feeling that no one understands or truly sees you.. It invites the user to observe where this belief may shape perception, reactions, and self-protection without treating it as fate or fixed identity.

content.void_power: The ability to connect with yourself.
content.path_of_return: Return from seeking connection outside to inner companionship.
content.wisewave_guidance: Loneliness is the doorway back to your soul.
content.reflective_summary_zh: 此空性之门映照的幻象是：觉得没人理解、没人能看见你。。邀请用户觉察此信念如何影响感知、反应与自我保护，而不将其视为命运或固定身份。

content.path_of_return_zh: 从外求连接回到内在陪伴。
content.wisewave_guidance_zh: 孤独是你回归灵魂的入口。

content.wisewave_guidance: Pain comes from misidentification, not from others.
content.reflective_summary_zh: 此空性之门映照的幻象是：将痛苦归因于他人。。邀请用户觉察此信念如何影响感知、反应与自我保护，而不将其视为命运或固定身份。
content.integration_key_zh: 整合从此开始：让他人从你的故事中退出。
content.core_illusion_zh: 将痛苦归因于他人。
content.path_of_return_zh: 让他人从你的故事中退出。
content.wisewave_guidance_zh: 痛苦来自误认，不来自他人。

content.name: Void Gate
content.reflection_question: What core illusion am I invited to see through?
content.reflective_summary: This Void Gate reflects the illusion of: “I am not worthy” / “I am not good enough.”. It invites the user to observe where this belief may shape perception, reactions, and self-protection without treating it as fate or fixed identity.
content.integration_key: The integration begins through: Use awareness to see your own light.
content.one_week_practice: For one week, pause once a day and ask: “Where did this illusion appear today, and what would feel more true, grounded, and kind?”
content.safe_language_note: This interpretation is symbolic and reflective. It is not predictive, diagnostic, deterministic, medical, legal, financial, or religious advice, and it does not define a fixed identity.
content.core_illusion: “I am not worthy” / “I am not good enough.”
content.void_challenge: Deep denial of one’s own worth.
content.void_power: Awakened self-affirmation.
content.path_of_return: Use awareness to see your own light.
content.wisewave_guidance: What you deny is the illusion, not the real you.
content.reflective_summary_zh: 此空性之门映照的幻象是：“我不值得”、“我不够好”。。邀请用户觉察此信念如何影响感知、反应与自我保护，而不将其视为命运或固定身份。
content.integration_key_zh: 整合从此开始：用觉知看见自己的光。
content.core_illusion_zh: “我不值得”、“我不够好”。
content.wisewave_guidance_zh: 你否定的是幻象，不是真实的你。

content.name: Void Gate
content.reflection_question: What core illusion am I invited to see through?
content.reflective_summary: This Void Gate reflects the illusion of: Believing effort can earn everything.. It invites the user to observe where this belief may shape perception, reactions, and self-protection without treating it as fate or fixed identity.
content.integration_key: The integration begins through: Return from “doing more” to “being yourself.”
content.one_week_practice: For one week, pause once a day and ask: “Where did this illusion appear today, and what would feel more true, grounded, and kind?”
content.safe_language_note: This interpretation is symbolic and reflective. It is not predictive, diagnostic, deterministic, medical, legal, financial, or religious advice, and it does not define a fixed identity.
content.core_illusion: Believing effort can earn everything.
content.void_power: The wisdom of flow and allowing.
content.path_of_return: Return from “doing more” to “being yourself.”
content.wisewave_guidance: Effort is not power; truth is.
content.reflective_summary_zh: 此空性之门映照的幻象是：相信努力可以换来一切。。邀请用户觉察此信念如何影响感知、反应与自我保护，而不将其视为命运或固定身份。
content.integration_key_zh: 整合从此开始：从“做更多”回到“成为自己”。
content.core_illusion_zh: 相信努力可以换来一切。
content.path_of_return_zh: 从“做更多”回到“成为自己”。
content.wisewave_guidance_zh: 努力不是力量，真实才是。

content.name: Void Gate
content.reflection_question: What core illusion am I invited to see through?
content.reflective_summary: This Void Gate reflects the illusion of: Believing the world is dangerous and must be defended against.. It invites the user to observe where this belief may shape perception, reactions, and self-protection without treating it as fate or fixed identity.
content.integration_key: The integration begins through: Practice relaxing, breathing, and trusting.
content.one_week_practice: For one week, pause once a day and ask: “Where did this illusion appear today, and what would feel more true, grounded, and kind?”
content.safe_language_note: This interpretation is symbolic and reflective. It is not predictive, diagnostic, deterministic, medical, legal, financial, or religious advice, and it does not define a fixed identity.
content.core_illusion: Believing the world is dangerous and must be defended against.
content.void_power: Deep inner safety.
content.path_of_return: Practice relaxing, breathing, and trusting.
content.wisewave_guidance: You were never truly threatened.
content.reflective_summary_zh: 此空性之门映照的幻象是：认为世界是危险的，必须防御。。邀请用户觉察此信念如何影响感知、反应与自我保护，而不将其视为命运或固定身份。
content.integration_key_zh: 整合从此开始：练习放松、呼吸、信任。
content.core_illusion_zh: 认为世界是危险的，必须防御。
content.wisewave_guidance_zh: 你从未真正被威胁过。

safe_language_note: This interpretation is symbolic and reflective. It is not predictive, diagnostic, deterministic, medical, legal, financial, or religious advice, and it does not define a fixed identity.
